description.id: Entitas teknologi grup Duta Firza yang fokus pada perakitan lokal dan solusi instrumentasi industri di Sentul, Jawa Barat.
description.en: Group technology arm focusing on local assembly and industrial instrumentation solutions, based in Sentul, West Java.

description.id: Entitas afiliasi yang memperluas jangkauan layanan dan portofolio teknologi Duta Firza Holding Group.
description.en: Affiliated entity extending the Duta Firza Holding Group's service reach and technology portfolio.
